(bit-and 1000000000000000 1000000000000000)
;;=> 1000000000000000
(bit-or 1000000000000000 255)
;;=> 1000000000000255
(bit-xor 1000000000000000 1000000000000001)
;;=> 1
(bit-not 1000000000000000)
;;=> -1000000000000001
(bit-shift-left 1 50)
;;=> 1125899906842624
(bit-shift-left 1 62)
;;=> 4611686018427387904
(bit-shift-left 1 63)
;;=> -9223372036854775808
(bit-shift-left 1000000000000000 10)
;;=> 1024000000000000000
(bit-shift-right 4611686018427387904 10)
;;=> 4503599627370496
(bit-shift-right -1000000000000000 4)
;;=> -62500000000000
(unsigned-bit-shift-right -1 1)
;;=> 9223372036854775807
(unsigned-bit-shift-right 1000000000000000 5)
;;=> 31250000000000
(bit-and 7 3)
;;=> 3
(bit-set 1000000000000000 0)
;;=> 1000000000000001
(bit-clear 1000000000000001 0)
;;=> 1000000000000000
(bit-flip 1000000000000000 1)
;;=> 1000000000000002
(bit-test 1000000000000000 40)
;;=> true
(bit-and-not 1000000000000000 255)
;;=> 1000000000000000
(Long/bitCount 1000000000000000)
;;=> 20
(Long/highestOneBit 1000000000000000)
;;=> 562949953421312
(Long/numberOfTrailingZeros 1000000000000000)
;;=> 15
(Long/reverse 1000000000000000)
;;=> 390487667228672
(Long/reverseBytes 1000000000000000)
;;=> 36247206819070720
(Long/rotateLeft 1000000000000000 4)
;;=> 16000000000000000
(Long/rotateRight 1000000000000000 4)
;;=> 62500000000000
(Long/max 1000000000000000 5)
;;=> 1000000000000000
(Long/min 1000000000000000 5)
;;=> 5
(Long/signum -1000000000000000)
;;=> -1
(Long/toHexString 1000000000000000)
;;=> "38d7ea4c68000"
(bit-and (bit-shift-left 1 40) (bit-shift-left 1 40))
;;=> 1099511627776
